case_title: SHAWN R. MILLER et al VS. PHYLLIS HAMPTON

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT HAMPTON, PHYLLIS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER, SHAWN R. DICKINSON, JASON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAMPTON, PHYLLIS $5,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $329.10 INTEREST, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,634.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: AUG-15-2012 ($35.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) AS TO DEFENDANT HAMPTON, PHYLLIS

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2012 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO JAN-10-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY $500.00 PER MONTH, STARTING NOVEMBER 1, 2012 AND CONTINUING ON THE FIRST DAY OF THE MONTH THEREAFTER. PROGRESS REPORTS ARE TO BE SCHEDULED EVERY TWO MONTHS. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-11-2013 IS CONTINUED TO MAY-13-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S FRIEND MICHAEL DEPAUL APPEARED ON HIS BEHALF AND STATED THAT PLAINTIFF HAD FAMILY EMERGENCY AND REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE FOR A HEARING. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE OF THE DEFENDANT. REQUEST FOR A RESET. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLER, SHAWN R. DICKINSON, JASON
ORDER DEFT'S CONTC REQUEST "DENIED". THE COURT REQUESTS THAT THE PARTIES APPEAR AS SCHEDULED TO DISCUSS THE STATUS OF THE PROBATE PROCEEDING AND HOW IT AFFECTS PLTFF'S CLAIM.
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO PHYLLIS HAMPTON, 1442 HAYES ST.;SF,CA.94117 (415) 831-2732
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED (ORIGINAL SUBPEONA NOT ATTACHED)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED APR-16-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HAMPTON, PHYLLIS
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HAMPTON, PHYLLIS

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL.
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2012 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-15-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506.
